sub_modules.fp_bandpass_coeff: Combinational hard-coded 31-tap band-pass FIR coefficient provider using the public coefficient list scaled to fixed point.
sub_modules.fp32_to_q: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision to signed fixed-point converter for each input sample.
sub_modules.fp_fir_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate datapath for the 31 FIR taps using fixed-point sample and coefficient values.
sub_modules.q_to_fp32: Combinational signed fixed-point to IEEE-754 single-precision converter for the filtered output.
